name: Scienjoy Holding Corporation
summary: Scienjoy Holding Corporation provides mobile live streaming platforms in the People's Republic of China. The company focuses on interactive show live streaming from broadcasters to users. Its platforms enable users to view and interact with broadcasters through online chat, virtual items, and playing games. As of December 31, 2020, the company had 332,410 paying users and 118,411 active broadcasters. It operates five platforms under the Showself, Lehai, Haixiu, BeeLive Chinese, and BeeLive International brands. The company also offers technical development and advisory services. Scienjoy Holding Corporation was founded in 2011 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
